name: Grilled Summer Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 4 yellow crookneck, zucchini, or pattypan squash into halves lengthwise. The total weight should be about 1 pound.
2. Brush the cut pieces with a mixture of 1 tablespoon margarine, 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice, and chopped fresh rosemary (or crushed dried rosemary).
3. Grill over medium-hot coals, 4 to 6 inches from the heat source, for 15 to 20 minutes, turning every few minutes.
4. Continue grilling until the pieces are tender when pierced.
Food Exchanges per serving: FREE; CAL: 26; PRO: 1g; CAR: 1g; FAT: 2g; CHO: 0mg; SOD: 7mg.
Joslin Diabetes Gourmet Cookbook by Bonnie Sanders Polin, PH.D., & Frances Tower Giedt.
